display_information.name: benvu
display_information.description: Benvu is your nonprofit’s AI teammate: finds grants, drafts reports and donor notes, and tracks deadlines — in any language.
display_information.long_description:
Benvu helps small nonprofit teams get more done without adding headcount. Here is what it can do:

🌱 Find funding — search real, open U.S. federal grants that fit your mission and budget.
📝 Do the writing — draft impact reports, donor thank-yous, and volunteer shift announcements from a few quick notes, then post them straight to a channel.
⏰ Keep track — remember a deadline and nudge your team in Slack before it is due.
🗒️ Catch up fast — turn messy meeting notes into a clean summary with decisions and action items.
🔎 Stay grounded — search your team’s past messages and files so answers reflect what people actually said.

Benvu tailors its suggestions to your work, whether you run a food bank, a mental health or crisis line, a school or youth program, an immigrant and refugee service, an arts group, or a general nonprofit. And it works in any language — write to it however you are comfortable, and it replies the same way.

agent_view.agent_description: Benvu is a teammate for nonprofit staff who wear ten hats and never have enough hours. Tell it what you need — grants to chase, a report due, a donor to thank — and it finds the answer or writes the first draft in seconds, in whatever language you write in.

slash_commands.description: Admin: view a summary of feedback ratings

shortcuts.name: Send to Benvu
shortcuts.description: Summarize, find grants, draft a report, or set a reminder from this message
